tier: Tier 7.6c - Long-Horizon Planning / Subgoal-Control Attribution + Promotion Decision
claim: Tier 7.6c preserves the Tier 7.6b local scaffold signal as a diagnostic result while blocking promotion, freeze, broad planning, and hardware/native transfer because feature-alignment risk remains high and reduced-feature generalization has not run.
caveat: Attribution/decision evidence only; not new performance scoring, not a promoted planning mechanism, not public usefulness proof, not a new baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, and not AGI/ASI evidence.
